label: The Pallid Lantern
description: The Pallid Lantern occupies a low-vaulted gallery off Pale Meridian Enclave’s covered causeway grid, its ferrocrete ribs reinforced with blast bracing and shuttered embrasures. Lumen globes sit behind hooded baffles and stain the room in a cold, regulated light consistent with the enclave’s blackout discipline. A long, scarred counter of riveted plasteel dominates the central bay, with fixed benches and bolted tables arranged to keep the aisles clear for armored passage. Vent grilles and auspex cabling run openly along the ceiling spine, giving the tavern the permanent character of a sanctioned gathering point under siege protocol.
